scripts.install:all: npm install --workspaces=false && npm --prefix apps/web install && npm --prefix backend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n web,backend -c cyan,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:web && npm run typecheck:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:web && npm run test:backend
